text:
No action required.** This is the known CLI-mode false positive — already documented in LEARNINGS.MD.

The "Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000" error is
expected when running in CLI mode. Agents call `notify_parent` (which hits the backend HTTP API), but no
backend server is listening in CLI mode. Agents still complete their tasks successfully — this is not a real failure

.

**Rule applied:** `Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000 is expected in CLI mode`
(confidence: high)

text: ✅ **Per

-task cost tracking is live!** Here's what was shipped:

---

###

💰 Per-Task Cost Tracking — Complete

| Layer | What was built |
|---|

---|
| **Storage** | `app/agents/<name>/COSTS.json` — per-agent array of cost records (task_id, tokens

_in/out, cost_usd, model, timestamp) |
| **Capture** | `app/utils/cost_tracker.py` — `record_cost()`

hooked into every LLM call via `UsageTracker.record_turn()` |
| **Pricing** | claude-sonnet-4-6

: $3/$15/MTok · claude-haiku-4-5: $1/$5 · claude-3-haiku: $0.25/$1.25 |
| **API** | `GET /costs
` (all records, filterable by `?agent=` + `?limit=`) · `GET /costs/summary`

(per-agent totals) |
| **UI** | New **"Costs"** tab in the dashboard — summary

table + per-task detail, retro amber/monospace styling |
| **Tests** | 16 new

tests · **188/188 total passing** · frontend build clean ✅ |

---
The next time you ask *"how much did the last
2 tasks cost?"* — the system will have the exact answer per
task, per agent, per model call. A server restart will activate
the new endpoints and UI tab.
Both
agents are in `done` state and this notification is a **stale/duplicate**
— the per-task cost tracking feature was already processed and reported at 2026-04-14 18:53.

No new work to action.

✅ Notification queue
is clear.
